# @codenhub/styles

> CSS-only Codenhub design tokens, reset, typography, layout and content utilities, component classes, native-element styling, and Tailwind CSS v4 source entrypoints.

This package is experimental: public tokens, class names, and import-path
composition may change. Use compiled entrypoints for ready-to-import CSS or
`/tw` entrypoints in a Tailwind CSS v4 build. The package has no JavaScript
behavior.

## Documentation

- [Documentation](./docs/index.md): Primary entrypoint for the complete public documentation.
- [README](./README.md): Installation, first use, requirements, and stability notes.
- [Tokens](./docs/tokens.md): Public CSS custom-property contract and theme-selector precedence.
- [Classes](./docs/classes.md): Layout, content, component, and typography helper reference.
- [Accessibility](./docs/accessibility.md): CSS accessibility behavior and consumer responsibilities.
